# Jan Žížala — Klempířské a pokrývačské práce

> Sole trader offering professional roofing and sheet metal work in Prague and surroundings. Contact: +420 603 720 337, Podvinný mlýn 2117, Praha.

## Pages

- [Úvod](/): Overview of services, gallery teaser, calls to action.
- [Galerie](/galerie): Photo gallery of completed roofing and sheet metal projects.
- [Reference](/reference): Customer testimonials and reviews.
- [Blog / Rady](/blog): Practical articles about roofs, gutters, and maintenance.
- [O mně](/o-mne): About Jan Žížala — background and experience.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers to common questions about pricing, warranty, materials.
- [Kontakt](/kontakt): Phone, address, contact form.
